heading: Global Fitness Platform
description: A globally deployed React Native fitness application supporting configurable training systems across multiple product types.
text: MARS is a React Native Android application developed for Escape Fitness and used globally across 300+ customer locations. The platform supports multiple product configurations—Functional, Recovery, and Strength—through a single, adaptable codebase, allowing the same platform to support multiple product offerings.

The application includes multilingual support, supporting expansion into new territories, alongside partner API integrations for analytics and scheduling functionality to manage and restrict session access. I designed and developed the application end-to-end, including a registration wizard, a workout player powered by workouts built from an exercise library, user analytics, and custom branding.

The platform is supported by a MERN stack backend, providing scalable data handling, integrations, and remote content and device management. I delivered this end-to-end, from UI/UX through to deployment and device installation.
